channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: France vs Australia free streams: How to watch Autumn International 2025, TV Channels, Preview & Team News
item.description: All the ways to watch France vs Australia live streams online, as Les Bleus host the Wallabies at Stade de France for their 2025 Autumn International closer.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Jones, TechRadar

item.title: New anti-Mamdani AI videos and the deepfake generation of astroturfing
item.description: A creepy account that’s almost certainly using AI to generate videos of imaginary New Yorkers criticizing mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani raises a frightening prospect: that deepfakes could be used not just to impersonate politicians, but also constituents.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Heilweil, Fast Company

item.title: IRS tech chief directs staff to take ‘skills assessment’ ahead of IT reorganization
item.description: The IRS tech chief told staff this summer that the agency needed to “reset and reassess,” because more than 25% of its workforce left the agency this year. The post IRS tech chief directs staff to take ‘skills assessment’ ahead of IT reorganization first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Comet AI browser lands on Android
item.description: Perplexity's Comet browser brings smart, voice-enabled AI help to mobile browsing, aiming to turn every tab into a conversation.
item.dc:creator: Eric Hal Schwartz, TechRadar

item.title: Is AI more appealing than crypto now? A major Bitcoin miner has decided to pivot to AI data centers - here's why
item.description: Bitfarm plans to abandon Bitcoin mining for AI data centers using existing energy capacity despite major losses and volatile markets.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: CIO Essential Insights: AI Priorities for IT Leaders
item.description: Join host John Gallant for a deep dive into Foundry’s 2025 AI Priorities research, including statistics on AI spending and budgeting, how best to put tools in the hands of employees, the big obstacles companies are facing with AI deployments as well as how best to expedite internal AI projects.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google’s Gemini 3 Pro: Better than mid
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. I’m Mark Sullivan, a senior writer at Fast Company, covering emerging tech, AI, and tech policy.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: CIO Essential Insights: Strategies for AI Success
item.description: Research indicates that an alarming number of AI projects fail to achieve their goals and provide hoped for return-on-investment.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Register today: CIO Essential Insights Cloud 2026: New Strategies for Success
item.description: Foundry research shows continued growth in enterprise cloud spending, with new AI initiatives a key driver of that increased investment. But at the same time, concerns about cloud expense, security, management, and skills are also ratcheting up.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cisco initiative targets device security
item.description: Cisco is announcing a security initiative that will push customers to update or replace aging infrastructure components, such as routers, switches and firewalls, as well as discourage them from using any insecure features.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A drying-up Rio Grande basin threatens water security on both sides of the border
item.description: Researchers have completed a full accounting of water uses and losses in the Rio Grande-Bravo basin as it faces severe shortages throughout its range in the United States and Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Susan Montoya Bryan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bubble fears ease but investors still waiting for AI to live up to its promise
item.description: Fears about the artificial intelligence boom turning into an overblown bubble have diminished for now, thanks to a stellar earnings report from Nvidia.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bubble fears ease but investors still waiting for AI to live up to its promise
item.description: Fears about the artificial intelligence boom turning into an overblown bubble have diminished for now, thanks to a stellar earnings report from Nvidia.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Server memory prices could double by 2026 as AI demand strains supply
item.description: Server memory prices could double by the end of 2026, driven by manufacturers’ pivot to AI-focused production and Nvidia’s shift to smartphone-style memory that is straining supply further.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cobalt 200: Microsoft’s next-gen Arm CPU targets lower TCO for cloud workloads
item.description: Microsoft has unveiled the next generation of its Arm-based custom CPUs in the form of Cobalt 200 as part of its ongoing efforts to reduce dependency on x86-based instances and make its data centers more energy-efficient while offering better performance for cloud computing workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: NetOps teams struggle with AI readiness
item.description: As more enterprise organizations adopt artificial intelligence, research reveals a growing gap between AI plans and network preparedness, according to Broadcom.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Improving annotation quality with machine learning
item.description: Data science and machine learning teams face a hidden productivity killer: annotation errors. Recent research from Apple analyzing production machine learning (ML) applications found annotation error rates averaging 10% across search relevance tasks.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: SAP touts Microsoft disaster recovery plan for Europe; Analysts doubt it will work
item.description: SAP has cut European deals with Microsoft, Capgemini, and Orange to ostensibly deliver an emergency disaster recovery failover if Microsoft is legally blocked from delivering European services.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fake flight cancellation texts target travelers
item.description: Fake airline texts claiming flight cancellations are targeting travelers with convincing scams. Learn how cybercriminals steal personal data and credit card info.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: TikTok malware scam tricks you with fake activation guides
item.description: New TikTok malware campaign tricks users into running PowerShell commands that download Aura Stealer, which steals credentials and authentication tokens.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
